# services.gitea-actions-runner

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.gitea-actions-runner`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.gitea-actions-runner.instances` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Gitea Actions Runner instances. |
| `services.gitea-actions-runner.instances.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Gitea Actions Runner instance. |
| `services.gitea-actions-runner.instances.<name>.hostPackages` | `list of package` | List of packages, that are available to actions, when the runner is configured with a host execution label. |
| `services.gitea-actions-runner.instances.<name>.labels` | `list of string` | Labels used to map jobs to their runtime environment. Changing these labels currently requires a new registration token. Many common actions require bash, git and nodejs, as well as a filesystem that follows the filesystem hierarchy standard. |
| `services.gitea-actions-runner.instances.<name>.name` | `string` | The name identifying the runner instance towards the Gitea/Forgejo instance. |
| `services.gitea-actions-runner.instances.<name>.settings` | `open submodule of (YAML 1.1 value)` | Configuration for gitea-runner daemon. See <https://gitea.com/gitea/runner/src/branch/main/internal/pkg/config/config.example.yaml> for an example configuration |
| `services.gitea-actions-runner.instances.<name>.token` | `null or string` | Plain token to register at the configured Gitea/Forgejo instance. |
| `services.gitea-actions-runner.instances.<name>.tokenFile` | `null or string or absolute path` | Path to an environment file, containing the `TOKEN` environment variable, that holds a token to register at the configured Gitea/Forgejo instance. |
| `services.gitea-actions-runner.instances.<name>.url` | `string` | Base URL of your Gitea/Forgejo instance. |
| `services.gitea-actions-runner.package` | `package` | The gitea-actions-runner package to use. |
